status: Stable - migrated to opBNB Testnet with a redeployed contract (geofence + no on-chain overtime). CSV import selector updated to match.
data_strategy: Primary data source is raw explorer transaction export CSV (BscScan-family). No live blockchain fetching from within the running app. Demo data is used only as fallback on first load.
current_focus: Contract migrated to opBNB Testnet (chain 5611) at 0x4654675c8C068aC49047e9E607C34BE2492c945e. New contract enforces a 500m GPS geofence on-chain and no longer tracks overtime at all (removed from clockOut()). Reports page lets managers search a single employee (by name or wallet) and pull their full clock-in/out history.
key_decisions: overtimeMinutes is always 0 from CSV imports; the contract no longer accepts it as a parameter at all (was previously self-reported and untrusted)
Mappings and logs are persisted in localStorage
Employee display name comes from WalletMapping
Reports.jsx added at route /reports for per-employee search + full session history
Session pairing logic extracted to src/utils/sessionPairing.js for reuse by Reports.jsx (LogsView.jsx still has its own inline copy pending a future refactor to share one source of truth)
Migrated from BSC Testnet to opBNB Testnet for cheaper gas; same BscScan-family explorer API shape at api-opbnb-testnet.bscscan.com
clockOut() selector changed from 0x6b92bb2a to 0xc0f5c77a since overtimeMinutes was dropped from its signature — importBscScanCsv.js and fetch-daily-csv.js updated to match
9-hour shift cooldown enforced app-side only (src/utils/shiftCooldown.js), not in the smart contract
known_limitations: GPS lat/lng validated on-chain via geofence, but not currently surfaced in the CSV import pipeline (explorer tx-list CSV doesn't include event/log data)
Overtime must be reconciled against the roster entirely outside this app now — there is no on-chain or CSV source for it
Demo data mixes with real data until user clears logs
Pairing logic is duplicated between LogsView.jsx and src/utils/sessionPairing.js until refactored
9-hour cooldown is a UX guard only — a direct contract call bypasses it since it's not enforced on-chain
last_major_change: Redeployed EmployeeClock.sol to opBNB Testnet with GPS geofence validation replacing the old lat/lng!=0 check, removed overtimeMinutes entirely from clockOut(), packed ClockEvent storage, and updated importBscScanCsv.js + fetch-daily-csv.js for the new contract address and ClockOut selector (0xc0f5c77a).
